alerts.title: Tame Impala: The Next Psychedelic Era Is Loading
alerts.description: On TikTok, you’ll find clips of people joking that they’d sell a kidney to stand under the lasers during "Apocalypse Dreams" — but behind the memes, there’s real anxiety. Fans are swapping strategies: presale codes, credit card partnerships, joining mailing lists, and even traveling to cities where prices tend to be slightly lower.
